summary: Replayed ADR 0276 from the committed 0.177.97 mainline release baseline, carried the private NATS JetStream runtime and preserved multi-principal auth contract onto the current 0.130.63 live platform, recovered a short shared Docker-runtime interference window during the exact-main replay, and re-verified clean stream reconciliation plus platform, secret-rotation, and RAG publish paths before advancing the platform version to 0.130.64.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest -m pytest -q tests/test_nats_jetstream_runtime_role.py tests/test_secret_rotation.py tests/test_service_id_resolver.py tests/unit/test_event_taxonomy.py tests/unit/test_ledger_writer.py tests/test_ansible_execution_scopes.py` returned `38 passed in 0.62s` on the final exact-main tree.

`uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py run --inventory inventory/hosts.yml --run-id ws0276syntax-postrebase --playbook playbooks/nats-jetstream.yml --env production -- --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump --syntax-check` passed, and `make preflight WORKFLOW=live-apply-service` also passed on the synchronized worktree.

verification.check: Exact-main NATS replay with correction loop
verification.observed: The exact-main replay from committed source `11009b71644263cb59832c290183696483035b37` first succeeded as `ws0276mainline-r1` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=78 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`, then a shared Docker-runtime restart path left `lv3-nats-jetstream` manually stopped; after a temporary compose recovery bridge, the authoritative replay `ws0276mainline-r2` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=80 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6 rescued=0 ignored=0` and re-verified the loopback monitor endpoint.

A fresh guest-local probe after `ws0276mainline-r2` confirmed `lv3-nats-jetstream` stayed `Up`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8222/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, and JetStream reported `10` streams including `PLATFORM_EVENTS`, `RAG_DOCUMENT`, and `SECRET_ROTATION`.
After the exact-main replay, `make check-nats-streams` and `make apply-nats-streams` both returned `PLATFORM_EVENTS: none`, `RAG_DOCUMENT: none`, and `SECRET_ROTATION: none`.

verification.check: Platform, secret-rotation, and RAG smoke publishes
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with nats-py python scripts/nats_streams.py --smoke-publish` advanced `PLATFORM_EVENTS` to sequence `170`, and follow-up raw JSON publishes advanced `SECRET_ROTATION` and `RAG_DOCUMENT` to stream-local sequence `3` with `stream_message_count=3`.

`git diff --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` all passed on the final tree.

`make remote-validate` passed on the exact final tree in detached `HEAD` mode, with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-syntax`, `dependency-graph`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `type-check`, and `workstream-surfaces` all reported as `passed`.

`make pre-push-gate` passed on the same exact final tree in detached `HEAD` mode, with `workstream-surfaces`, `agent-standards`, `documentation-index`, `yaml-lint`, `schema-validation`, `policy-validation`, `alert-rule-validation`, `dependency-direction`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `dependency-graph`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `ansible-syntax`, `ansible-lint`, `type-check`, `service-completeness`, `packer-validate`, `tofu-validate`, `security-scan`, and `integration-tests` all reported as `passed`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0276 on top of repository version 0.177.97 and the prior live platform baseline 0.130.63.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains part of the audit trail, but the canonical NATS JetStream receipt for integrated main now points at this exact-main replay.

The first exact-main replay encountered a short shared Docker-runtime interference window that manually stopped the NATS container with exit code 0; the same committed tree was replayed again after recovery and ended green.

correction_loop.repair_action: Inspected the exited container, brought `lv3-nats-jetstream` back with `/opt/nats-jetstream/docker-compose.yml` as a temporary bridge, then reran `playbooks/nats-jetstream.yml` from committed source `11009b71644263cb59832c290183696483035b37` as `ws0276mainline-r2`.
correction_loop.verification: The replay re-verified `http://127.0.0.1:8222/healthz`, controller-side check/apply both returned no drift, and the platform plus cross-domain smoke publishes landed in the expected streams.
